rationale: Section 49.103 governs allocation of taxable value when a parcel spans multiple school districts due to detachment and annexation. It does not reference or depend on the homestead exemption amount in Tax Code §11.13(b).
quote: the parcel or other item of property shall be appraised for taxation as a unit, and the agreement shall allocate the taxable value of the property between the districts.
_note: No conflict identified; the proposed homestead exemption increase does not interact with this allocation provision.
